title: Code-to-Cloud Traceability + Dependency Mapping — Developer Risk Attribution
description: code_to_cloud.py traces the full provenance chain from code commit to runtime finding with blast radius analysis and developer risk profiles. test_security_dependency_mapping_engine.py clusters here confirming BFS blast radius works. Gap: developer risk profiles are computed but never surfaced to the developer via IDE plugin or PR comment — the feedback loop to the developer is missing.
missing: PR comment integration: when a code change introduces a new finding, post a GitHub PR comment via universal_connector with the traceability chain and blast radius summary
IDE plugin feedback: expose /api/v1/ide/code-risk endpoint that takes a file path + line range and returns associated code-to-cloud risk entries
Developer risk digest: weekly email to each developer with their security-relevant change count, defect rate, and top-3 open findings they introduced (anonymized framing, not blame)
